en: I need to atone for my personal failings with my wife, Alicia, and our two children.
Hey, you all right? All rise!
I haven't learned a lot by watching Alicia. She's a natural.
She has an agenda, whether you believe it or not.
I want to run my first campaign, Peter Floric for governor.
You don't want sex to be an issue here. It's not an issue.
Do you know what a betrayal this is? You were poison!
You think you can play the emotional card with me?
The Good Wife, the entire series now streaming on Hulu.
